MiniSimmy2 — Legend & Guide

Environmental Cycles
The world cycles through Fertile → Normal → Drought periods. Fertile gives higher energy gain and reproduction. Drought increases drain and makes survival harder.
Modules (Tiers I–X)
Harvester
Increases energy from food zones and white particles. Higher tiers = larger pickup range.
Sensor
Better hazard detection and avoidance. Higher tiers = predictive dodging.
Mover
Helps escape the vortex center. Higher tiers = better spiral escape.
Resistant
Reduces energy drain, especially useful in Drought phases.
Explorer
Increases exploration and random movement. Helps avoid getting stuck.
Communicator
Strengthens pheromone signals and hazard warnings.
3 of the same module = upgrade to next tier.
Harvester
Sensor
Mover
Resistant
Explorer
Communicator
Voidheart Prestige (Incubator)
Forge Voidheart Shards in Inventory (1 Billion Crystals each). In the Incubator, spend shards to prestige a creature: the brain is preserved, all ordinary modules are stripped, and a permanent core specialization is distilled from the exact module composition (hybrids like Void Garden, Storm Shell, Null Harmony, etc.). Cost scales with generation and prior prestiges. Use Cycle Again when a cycle completes to keep incubating without claiming.
Aether Tech Tree
Open Tech Tree below the main menu. Spend crystals within each tier, then pay the gate cost to unlock deeper tiers. Perks include Crystal Resonance (bonus crystals on prestige), Incubator Insight (faster cycles), Module Resonance, Anomaly Spawner, Evolution Leak, Crystal Lattice (vault score + multi-echo spawns), Auto-Prestige Protocol, and God-Tier Ascendant modules. Aether Sovereigns (crown icon) are a premium currency shown in the top bar — spending coming soon.
Inspector Portrait Colors
Normal — dark gray
Predator — deep red
Social pressure — orange
Infection — purple
Yellow → Brown Honey Blooms
Creatures deposit honey that slowly moves toward food nodes. When it stops, it becomes a new food patch.
Green Energy Orbs
Released on death. Pulled by vortex to food nodes and restore food (gives High Roller Points).
Purple Infection Particles
Prune mode spores — infect creatures on contact. Inspector background turns violet until cured with white particles.
Red Hazard Particles
Dangerous threats (AOE + DoT). Can be toggled in the Cheats Store.
Cursor Hazard Tool
Mouse becomes a damaging red particle. Buy in the Cheats Store.
Current Version: v2.01
Gene Vault slots are now fully purchasable and persistent. Higher tier modules give better prestige value.

Extract to Egg

Select a top creature to extract its brain into an egg (costs 250,000 High Roller Points)

Egg Inventory

Hold up to 10 eggs — tap slot numbers to assign to Incubator or Gene Vault.

0/10 eggs
Extract creatures in the Inspector, then route eggs here. 0/50 ammo slots

Gene Vault

Store eggs across prestiges. Score mult = egg value × slot upgrade. Unlock slots 500K→10B.

Occupied slots stack egg score mults — stronger eggs = bigger boost. Quick-assign via Egg Inventory → tap vault slot #

Incubator

Cycles grow modules & slot multipliers. Unlock 500K→10B · automate 1/5m.

Automation auto-cycles and improves occupied slots. Quick-assign via Egg Inventory → tap slot # on any egg

Module Tier Multipliers

Each boost doubles in power. Crystal cost doubles per tier (1, 2, 4…). Tap a tier to upgrade it, or upgrade all at once.
